title: Salty Fluffy Portuguese Pork Stir-Fry
description: A gluten-free-friendly solo-dinner dish featuring pork shoulder braised with salty and flavorful ingredients for a fluffy texture.
instructions: Season pork shoulder with salt and pepper. Melt 2 tbsp of olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add garlic and cook until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Place the seasoned pork shoulder skin-side down into the hot pan, reduce heat to medium-low, and braise for approximately 2 hours or until tender (internal temperature reaches 145°F).
Meanwhile, in a small bowl mix soy sauce, white wine vinegar, lemon zest, and pepper. Remove from heat.
After pork is fully cooked, stir in the soy mixture to coat evenly.
Garnish with dill sprigs and fresh parsley before serving.
